description: From the manufacturer Mercury | 4-Gang Individually Switched Extension Lead | 2 Metre Cable | White The Mercury 4-Gang Individually Switched Extension Lead is designed to give you more control over your power usage. With four UK sockets and individual switches, you can cut power to appliances on standby, saving energy while enhancing safety. The 2-metre cable offers flexibility, while the slimline, wall-mountable design makes it an ideal choice for homes and workspaces where additional outlets are needed. Compared to standard extension leads, Mercury’s individual switch feature allows you to control each device separately, preventing unnecessary power drain. Many competitors offer basic multi-socket power strips, but few provide separate power switches for each device, helping reduce energy costs in the long run. The integrated red neon indicators ensure clear visibility of powered devices. Whether you need an extension lead for gaming setups, home offices, kitchen appliances, or entertainment systems, this heavy-duty, 13A-rated power strip ensures reliability and safety in any environment.
